subcodes.first_line: This evanescent atom doth enjoin, at the hour when it hath severed itself from all who dwell within the realm of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وصیت مینماید این ذره فانیه در هنگامیکه  که  منقطع است از کل من فی الملک و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
